query: Database connection pool exhausted causing application timeouts
expected_answer: Increase the database connection pool size and add a read replica to distribute load. Monitor connection metrics to set appropriate pool limits.

query: Storage disk full on production server
expected_answer: Clear log files and temporary data, expand disk capacity or add additional storage volume. Implement automated disk usage alerting.

query: Network latency spike between microservices
expected_answer: Check network interface utilisation and review routing rules. Implement service mesh or load balancer health checks to route around congested nodes.

query: Application throwing OutOfMemoryError every few hours
expected_answer: Capture heap dump and analyse with memory profiler. Fix identified memory leak, increase JVM heap allocation, and add memory usage monitoring.

query: CPU utilisation at 100% causing service degradation
expected_answer: Profile the application to identify CPU-intensive code paths. Optimise hot code, implement caching for expensive computations, and scale horizontally if needed.

query: Hardware server failing to boot after power outage
expected_answer: Run hardware diagnostics to check disk and memory integrity. Replace failed hardware components and restore from latest backup if filesystem corruption detected.

query: Unauthorised access attempt detected on production database
expected_answer: Immediately block the offending IP, rotate all database credentials, and audit access logs. Enable enhanced logging and notify the security team.

query: Slow database queries degrading application response time
expected_answer: Identify slow queries via EXPLAIN ANALYZE, add missing indexes, and consider query optimisation or caching frequently accessed results.

query: File storage service returning 503 errors intermittently
expected_answer: Check storage service health and connectivity. Verify IOPS limits are not exceeded and review storage service logs for underlying errors.

query: Application failing to connect to external API service
expected_answer: Verify the external API endpoint is reachable, check firewall rules and DNS resolution. Implement retry logic with exponential backoff.

query: Service crashing due to unhandled NullPointerException
expected_answer: Add null checks in the identified code path, deploy hotfix, and add unit tests to cover the edge case. Review logs to identify all impacted requests.

query: High memory consumption by background jobs
expected_answer: Profile background job memory usage and implement streaming or pagination for large dataset processing. Add memory limits to job containers.

query: RAID array degraded after disk failure
expected_answer: Replace the failed disk, allow RAID rebuild to complete, verify data integrity, and restore from backup if rebuild fails.

query: SSL certificate expired causing HTTPS failures
expected_answer: Renew the SSL certificate immediately, deploy it to all load balancers, and set up automated certificate renewal using Let's Encrypt or similar.

query: Database deadlock occurring under concurrent writes
expected_answer: Review transaction isolation levels and query ordering. Implement optimistic locking where possible and add deadlock detection alerting.

query: Object storage bucket access denied errors
expected_answer: Review IAM permissions and bucket policies. Ensure the service account has the required read/write permissions on the target bucket.

query: Load balancer health checks failing for backend nodes
expected_answer: Check health check endpoint configuration and backend node responsiveness. Restart unhealthy nodes and adjust health check thresholds if too aggressive.

query: Microservice deployment failing with ImagePullBackOff
expected_answer: Verify container registry credentials and image tag existence. Update image pull secrets in Kubernetes and ensure the registry is reachable from the cluster.

query: API response times above SLA threshold during peak hours
expected_answer: Scale out API instances, implement response caching for repeated queries, and enable database query result caching. Review slow query log during peak periods.

query: Server NIC failing causing packet loss
expected_answer: Replace the faulty NIC, update network drivers, and failover traffic to redundant network interface during replacement.

query: API keys leaked in public repository
expected_answer: Rotate all exposed credentials immediately, revoke the leaked keys, remove secrets from git history using BFG Repo Cleaner, and implement pre-commit hooks to prevent future leaks.

query: Postgres replication lag causing read replica stale data
expected_answer: Check replication slot lag and network bandwidth between primary and replica. Address any long-running transactions blocking WAL cleanup.

query: Backup job failing due to insufficient disk space
expected_answer: Clean up old backup files, add more backup storage, and implement backup rotation policy to automatically remove backups older than retention period.

query: VPN connection drops affecting remote worker access
expected_answer: Check VPN gateway utilisation and session limits. Restart VPN service and review gateway logs for authentication or capacity issues.

query: Third party dependency causing build pipeline failures
expected_answer: Pin dependency versions in package.json or requirements.txt, use a private package mirror, and add fallback to cached dependencies.

query: Garbage collection pauses causing latency spikes
expected_answer: Tune JVM GC settings, switch to G1GC or ZGC for lower pause times, and reduce object allocation rate by optimising hot code paths.

query: Power supply unit failure causing server shutdown
expected_answer: Replace faulty PSU with a redundant unit, verify power draw is within capacity, and test failover to redundant PSU before returning to production.

query: Brute force login attempts against admin portal
expected_answer: Enable account lockout after failed attempts, add rate limiting on login endpoint, implement MFA, and block offending IP ranges at the firewall.

query: Index corruption in Elasticsearch causing search failures
expected_answer: Close and reopen the corrupted index. If corruption persists, delete and reindex from source data. Ensure adequate disk space and shard allocation.

query: NFS mount point becoming unresponsive
expected_answer: Remount the NFS share, check NFS server health and network connectivity. Consider switching to hard mounts with timeout settings to recover automatically.
